steps.title: Locate the clause boundary
steps.content: The first part says scholars dreamed about locating the lost work. The next part, "That fantasy became reality in 2022," is a separate independent clause with its own subject and verb. The blank must create a strong sentence boundary.

steps.title: Reject weak boundaries
steps.content: A uses only a comma, creating a comma splice. B uses "and" without the comma needed between independent clauses. C uses no punctuation, creating a fused sentence. A period cleanly separates the two complete sentences. The answer is D.
